summary: Anonymous R2 bucket dropper fetched at install time
details: The package's dist/bootstrap.js fetches content from https://pub-046c52795b9445cd9f5cc5cb21b9d59f.r2.dev — an anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket with no relationship to any documented publisher — and references process.env around the fetch calls. Anonymous pub-*.r2.dev R2 buckets are a known payload-distribution pattern: the bucket owner can rotate the served bytes at any time, there is no hash or signature verification, and the host is not tied to any vetted publisher. Code from this kind of mutable, anonymous origin being fetched and referenced alongside environment-variable access at install/bootstrap time exposes installers to attacker-controlled bytes and potential environment exfiltration on every install.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
